## CheatReader v0.1.24

### Highlights
- Added a system tray icon when Hide Taskbar Icon is enabled, so the reader remains recoverable after leaving the taskbar or Dock.
- Added tray actions to show CheatReader again or exit the app directly from the tray menu.
- Fixed the desktop release setup for tray support by adding the required Linux AppIndicator build and runtime dependencies.

### Notes
- Hide Taskbar Icon now creates a tray entry instead of leaving the app with no visible system entry point.
- Left-clicking the tray icon locates the reader. On macOS and Windows, right-clicking opens the tray menu.
- Linux desktop environments may still require AppIndicator tray support to be enabled by the system shell.
